wers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"content_type":"application/octet-stream","state":"uploaded","size":2630144,"digest":"sha256:7a2cf0fade8e811af19f45c77dc48968a9389e9c8cb4ca341f4038886c76623f","download_count":409,"created_at":"2026-05-12T16:57:58Z","updated_at":"2026-05-12T16:57:59Z","browser_download_url":"https://github.com/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/download/2026.5.12.1017/bosshealth.dll"}],"tarball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/tarball/2026.5.12.1017","zipball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/zipball/2026.5.12.1017","body":"## BossHealth Version 2026.5.12.1017

Build from commit: 2438f197ba17b4327695968a8a5c49e49c851d7f

### Installation
1. Download `bosshealth.dll`
2. Copy it to your gw2 addons directory
3. Nexus should pick it up automatically, but you will have to press load on the addon to start it.
4. If you want advanced mode, enable it in the addon options.

### Changes
**Updated for game build 200,514**

Include a bunch of raid boss breakbar values by default, this update will create a species.json file in your addons\BossHealth folder, any custom breakbars you (have) set through the options menu will take precedence over this list.

### Breaking Change
Advanced Mode positioning now follows game ui scaling, this means that some of you will have to reset the values, if you want (hopefully) working default you can also chose to remove your settings file in addons\BossHealth\settings.json and let the addon recreate it (do this after disabling the addon or while not having gw2 launched)."},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/315416369","assets_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/315416369/assets","upload_url":"https://uploads.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/315416369/assets{?name,label}","html_url":"https://github.com/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/tag/2026.4.29.1193","id":315416369,"author":{"login":"tgk247","id":214889230,"node_id":"U_kgDODM7zDg","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/214889230?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247","html_url":"https://github.com/tgk247","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"node_id":"RE_kwDOQW2Yss4SzN8x","tag_name":"2026.4.29.1193","target_commitish":"main","name":"2026.4.29.1193","draft":false,"immutable":true,"prerelease":false,"created_at":"2026-04-29T15:55:36Z","updated_at":"2026-05-12T17:44:17Z","published_at":"2026-04-29T19:55:38Z","assets":[{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/assets/408459252","id":408459252,"node_id":"RA_kwDOQW2Yss4YWJf0","name":"bosshealth.dll","label":"","uploader":{"login":"tgk247","id":214889230,"node_id":"U_kgDODM7zDg","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/214889230?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247","html_url":"https://github.com/tgk247","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/tgk247/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"content_type":"application/octet-stream","state":"uploaded","size":2630144,"digest":"sha256:fa49a58be2f059bfa61c75bd00a219ce9ed6f03de3bfc403f8064336cb197b55","download_count":80,"created_at":"2026-04-29T19:54:35Z","updated_at":"2026-04-29T19:54:35Z","browser_download_url":"https://github.com/tgk247/bsshlth/releases/download/2026.4.29.1193/bosshealth.dll"}],"tarball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/tarball/2026.4.29.1193","zipball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tgk247/bsshlth/zipball/2026.4.29.1193","body":"## BossHealth Version 2026.4.29.1193

Build from commit: bf38088464a03a4bd4f15591f52182aacb512eee

### Installation
1. Download `bosshealth.dll`
2. Copy it to your gw2 addons directory
3. Nexus should pick it up automatically, but you will have to press load on the addon to start it.
4. If you want advanced mode, enable it in the addon options.

### Changes
Include a bunch of raid boss breakbar values by default, this update will create a `species.json` file in your `addons\BossHealth` folder, any custom breakbars you (have) set through the options menu will take precedence over this list.

### Breaking Change
Advanced Mode positioning now follows game ui scaling, this means that some of you will have to reset the values, if you want (hopefully) working default you can also chose to remove your settings file in `addons\BossHealth\settings.json` and let the addon recreate it (do this after disabling the addon or while not having gw2 launched).
